note: golden_hash is empty until first golden-parity.test.mjs --update. Same bond as art-329/art-330's fixtures (6% coupon, 5yr, semiannual, YTM 8%) so duration/DV01/convexity form a cross-checked family on one bond.

vectors.name: convexity_semiannual_bullet
vectors.description: 6% coupon, $1000 face, 5yr to maturity, semiannual, YTM 8%. Closed-form convexity 21.151083.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: Standard closed-form bond convexity, textbook definition (Fabozzi, Bond Markets Ch.4)
output_payload.note: Convexity = sum(CF_t * t*(t+1) / (1+y)^(t+2)) / Price, annualized by dividing by periods_per_year^2. Same even-period bullet-bond schedule as compute_bond_duration/compute_dv01 (no odd first coupon / stub support, declared limitation). convexity_price_adjustment_pct only populates when yield_shock_bp is supplied (0.5 * convexity * dy^2 second-order term).
